title: Watch Party Modpack
description: A lightweight modpack with the WaterMedia mod where you can watch videos with your friends.
body:
# Watch videos, play games, make music, and take pictures.

![Daily Dose of Internet on a TV in Minecraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34132fdd5d99714cccf568ab15ba9232afd6a2ee.png)
You can watch any video from any site (youtube, google drive, dropbox etc) and even video files on your pc.
## Main Mods Included
> ### - [WaterFrames](https://modrinth.com/mod/waterframes)
> ### - [Camerapture](https://modrinth.com/mod/camerapture)
> ### - [Charta](https://modrinth.com/mod/charta)
> ### - [Joy of Painting](https://modrinth.com/mod/joy-of-painting)
> ### - [Music Maker Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/music-maker-mod)
> ### - [Chipped](https://modrinth.com/mod/chipped)
> ### - [Furnies](https://modrinth.com/mod/furnies)
